text: March, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}...
asr: March, Donghun, my friend.
patch: March, Dan Heng, my friend...

text: I no longer have the strength... to make The Hero Within look like {NICKNAME}.
asr: I no longer have the strength to make the hero within look like her.
patch: I no longer have the strength... to make The Hero Within look like her.

text: We finally meet, {NICKNAME}.
asr: We finally meet.
patch: We finally meet.

text: Please keep helping {NICKNAME} and the others in the future, too, Miss Black Swan.
asr: Please keep helping them. And the others in the future too, Miss Black Swan.
patch: Please keep helping them and the others in the future, too, Miss Black Swan.

text: Can you forgive me, {NICKNAME}? I made a decision on my own while you were away...
asr: Can you forgive me, friend? I made a decision on my own while you were away.
patch: Can you forgive me, friend? I made a decision on my own while you were away...

text: After such a good sleep, you must be bursting with energy now, right, {NICKNAME}?
asr: After such a good sleep, you must be bursting with energy now, right, friend?
patch: After such a good sleep, you must be bursting with energy now, right, friend?

text: "And in {NICKNAME}'s heart, I know I will always be given the name I love most, the one you gave me."
asr: And in your heart, I know I will always be given the name I love most—the one you gave me.
patch: "And in your heart, I know I will always be given the name I love most, the one you gave me."

text: The first time... was also the last time I saw you, {NICKNAME} ♪
asr: The 1st time was also the last time I saw you, friend.
patch: The first time... was also the last time I saw you, friend ♪

text: All I wanted to say was, "Don't give up. {NICKNAME} will find you"... "Memory" truly is amazing.
asr: All I wanted to say was, don't give up. She will find you. Memory truly is amazing.
patch: All I wanted to say was, "Don't give up. She will find you"... "Memory" truly is amazing.

text: Promise me one last thing, {NICKNAME}...
asr: Promise me one last thing, friend.
patch: Promise me one last thing, friend...

text: "The stars across the cosmos will know: I am the fairy who wrote As I've Written together with {NICKNAME}."
asr: The stars across the cosmos will know. I am the fairy who wrote, as I've written, together with you.
patch: "The stars across the cosmos will know: I am the fairy who wrote As I've Written together with you."

text: But Amphoreus already has a "tomorrow." So, as long as {NICKNAME} carefully preserves and tends to all the seeds, then when the Trailblaze creates another miracle someday in the future...
asr: But Amphoreus already has a tomorrow, so as long as you carefully preserve and tend to all the seeds, then, when the Trailblaze creates another miracle someday in the future.
patch: But Amphoreus already has a "tomorrow." So, as long as you carefully preserve and tend to all the seeds, then when the Trailblaze creates another miracle someday in the future...

text: The spear of Strife nearly claimed {NICKNAME}'s life...
asr: The spear of strife nearly claimed her life.
patch: The spear of Strife nearly claimed her life...

text: Cyrene. And {NICKNAME}...
asr: Sireni. And you.
patch: Cyrene. And you...

text: We're its co-authors after all, {NICKNAME}.
asr: We're its co-authors, after all, friend.
patch: We're its co-authors after all, friend.

text: This is the first step of {NICKNAME}'s journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Ummm... Just think of it as a supersized Grove of Epiphany.
asr: This is the 1st step of my friend's journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Um, just think of it as a super-sized grove of epiphany.
patch: This is the first step of my friend's journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Ummm... Just think of it as a supersized Grove of Epiphany.

text: Give me your blessings, {NICKNAME}. Then...
asr: Give me your blessings, friend. Then.
patch: Give me your blessings, friend. Then...

text: Are you nervous? Me too, actually. {NICKNAME} and I weren't so reserved around each other when I was still Mem.
asr: Are you nervous? Me too, actually. You and I weren't so reserved around each other when I was still mem.
patch: Are you nervous? Me too, actually. You and I weren't so reserved around each other when I was still Mem.

text: Not a problem! {NICKNAME} can just relax. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...
asr: Not a problem. You can just relax. By the way, speaking of joining hands.
patch: Not a problem! You can just relax. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...

text: It's also {NICKNAME}'s previous stop, where they went through a risky but exciting adventure.
asr: It's also my friend's previous stop, where they went through a risky but exciting adventure.
patch: It's also my friend's previous stop, where they went through a risky but exciting adventure.

text: Look, over there. Looks like {NICKNAME} is talking to Madam Herta in this memory.
asr: Look, over there! Looks like she's talking to Madam Herta in this memory.
patch: Look, over there. Looks like she is talking to Madam Herta in this memory.

text: Remember the joke we made back at the Grove, {NICKNAME}?
asr: Remember the joke we made back at the grove?
patch: Remember the joke we made back at the Grove?

text: {NICKNAME} probably already knew about the geniuses' plans from that "memory." I had to hide really well in a corner in Time so Lygus wouldn't find me, and wait for the right opportunity.
asr: You probably already knew about the genius's plans for that memory. I had to hide really well in a corner in time so Logas wouldn't find me, and wait for the right opportunity.
patch: You probably already knew about the geniuses' plans from that "memory." I had to hide really well in a corner in Time so Lygus wouldn't find me, and wait for the right opportunity.

text: I see. After all, your burden sure is heavy, {NICKNAME}. You're carrying the weight of the entire world...
asr: I see. After all, your burden sure is heavy, my friend. You're carrying the weight of the entire world.
patch: I see. After all, your burden sure is heavy, my friend. You're carrying the weight of the entire world...

text: Hahaha, {NICKNAME} is way too honest! But that innocence is what makes you so uniquely charming.
asr: You're way too honest, but that innocence is what makes you so uniquely charming.
patch: Hahaha, you're way too honest! But that innocence is what makes you so uniquely charming.

text: But that's not who I am. I'm just an average girl with some secrets. So... I've been waiting for {NICKNAME} for a thousand years.
asr: But that's not who I am. I'm just an average girl with some secrets. So I've been waiting for you for a thousand years.
patch: But that's not who I am. I'm just an average girl with some secrets. So... I've been waiting for you for a thousand years.

text: I'm gonna keep doing what I just did if you don't stop, you know? {NICKNAME} and I won't allow you to leave this "memory" no matter what happens...
asr: I'm gonna keep doing what I just did if you don't stop, you know. My friend and I won't allow you to leave this memory, no matter what happens.
patch: I'm gonna keep doing what I just did if you don't stop, you know? My friend and I won't allow you to leave this "memory" no matter what happens...

text: You've already mentioned {NICKNAME} and I, so it's an easy connection to make, no? My intuition has always been very on-point.
asr: You've already mentioned my friend and I, so it's an easy connection to make. No, my intuition has always been very on point.
patch: You've already mentioned my friend and I, so it's an easy connection to make, no? My intuition has always been very on-point.

text: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Did you miss me while you were away?
asr: Long time no see, friend. Did you miss me while you were away?
patch: Long time no see, friend. Did you miss me while you were away?

text: As long as {NICKNAME} and I are together, we can do anything.
asr: As long as my friend and I are together, we can do anything.
patch: As long as my friend and I are together, we can do anything.

text: {NICKNAME} is always so serious, and that's why you always feel so reassuring. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...
asr: You're always so serious, and that's why you always feel so reassuring. By the way, speaking of joining hands.
patch: You're always so serious, and that's why you always feel so reassuring. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...

text: Speaking of the Order... Another one of {NICKNAME}'s companions may be able to enlighten you further on that.
asr: Speaking of the order, another one of my friend's companions may be able to enlighten you further on that.
patch: Speaking of the Order... Another one of my friend's companions may be able to enlighten you further on that.

text: What about you, {NICKNAME}? What did you feel when we touched each other?
asr: What about you? What did you feel when we touched each other?
patch: What about you? What did you feel when we touched each other?

text: Same here. I've been waiting for {NICKNAME} for a thousand years...
asr: Same here. I've been waiting for you for a thousand years.
patch: Same here. I've been waiting for you for a thousand years...

text: How wonderful! You're so patient, {NICKNAME}. Stories only shine when they have a listener like you.
asr: How wonderful! You're so patient. Stories only shine when they have a listener like you.
patch: How wonderful! You're so patient. Stories only shine when they have a listener like you.

text: Thanks, {NICKNAME}, I knew it! You're the best!
asr: Thanks! I knew it. You're the best.
patch: Thanks, I knew it! You're the best!

text: Ah, {NICKNAME}, it's good to see you! Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Aedes Elysiae?
asr: Ah, it's good to see you. Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Eidesilicyi?
patch: Ah, it's good to see you! Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Aedes Elysiae?

text: That's right, {NICKNAME}, you get it too, don't you? Sometimes, you just feel so radiant you can't help but stop in front of a mirror...
asr: Ah, that's right. You get it too, don't you? Sometimes you just feel so radiant, you can't help but stop in front of a mirror.
patch: That's right, you get it too, don't you? Sometimes, you just feel so radiant you can't help but stop in front of a mirror...

text: So formal! Perhaps... {NICKNAME} might just have some leadership potential?
asr: So formal. Perhaps you might just have some leadership potential.
patch: So formal! Perhaps... you might just have some leadership potential?

text: I was only joking! I just wanted to see your reaction. And sure enough, {NICKNAME}, you never let me down.
asr: I was only joking. I just wanted to see your reaction, and sure enough, you never let me down.
patch: I was only joking! I just wanted to see your reaction. And sure enough, you never let me down.

text: Can I ask? {NICKNAME}, do you like being by yourself? I do. Just staring at the lake by myself, gently swaying on the swing... My mind drifts far away, and by the time it comes back, I've already fallen asleep.
asr: Can I ask, do you like being by yourself? I do. Just staring at the lake by myself, gently swaying on the swing, my mind drifts far away, and by the time it comes back, I've already fallen asleep.
patch: Can I ask? Do you like being by yourself? I do. Just staring at the lake by myself, gently swaying on the swing... My mind drifts far away, and by the time it comes back, I've already fallen asleep.

text: My, what a cheerful scene! Already getting along so well with the fairies? No surprise, {NICKNAME}. You shine no matter where you go.
asr: My, what a cheerful scene! Already getting along so well with the fairies. No surprise, you shine no matter where you go.
patch: My, what a cheerful scene! Already getting along so well with the fairies? No surprise, you shine no matter where you go.

text: {NICKNAME} seems excited and wants to play the "New Friend Game" with everyone. Hehe, let's humor her.
asr: She seems excited and wants to play the new friend game with everyone. Let's humor her.
patch: She seems excited and wants to play the "New Friend Game" with everyone. Hehe, let's humor her.

text: But listen, {NICKNAME}, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after"?
asr: But listen, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the chronocognitive anchor to be looked after?
patch: But listen, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after"?

text: So don't worry. Let the 33,550,337th Flame-Chase Journey become part of {NICKNAME}, too. I've gotten a lot better at it with the experience from the last time.
asr: So don't worry, let the thirty-three million 550300 and thirty-seventh flame chase journey become part of you too. I've gotten a lot better at it with the experience from the last time.
patch: So don't worry. Let the 33,550,337th Flame-Chase Journey become part of you, too. I've gotten a lot better at it with the experience from the last time.

text: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...
asr: After all, if the little imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next.
patch: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

text: I wonder what kind of expression {NICKNAME} is wearing right now? Probably the same as always: calm, resolute, and brimming with confidence.
asr: I wonder what kind of expression you're wearing right now. Probably the same as always, calm, resolute, and brimming with confidence.
patch: I wonder what kind of expression you're wearing right now? Probably the same as always: calm, resolute, and brimming with confidence.

text: {NICKNAME}, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."
asr: Hmm. Why don't we go with their plan and hand over the chronocognitive anchor to be looked after?
patch: Hmm, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."

text: After all, it took 33 million cycles for {NICKNAME} to arrive in our world... What's a few moments more?
asr: After all, it took thirty-three million cycles for her to arrive in our world. What's a few moments more?
patch: After all, it took 33 million cycles for her to arrive in our world... What's a few moments more?

text: {NICKNAME}! S—Slow down!
asr: Ugh, just slow down.
patch: S—Slow down!

text: You must be really confused right now, aren't you, {NICKNAME}? So much has happened in Amphoreus while you were gone.
asr: You must be really confused right now, aren't you? So much has happened in Emporia since while you were gone.
patch: You must be really confused right now, aren't you? So much has happened in Amphoreus while you were gone.

text: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust {NICKNAME} anywhere, anytime.
asr: All right, all right. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us. She can trust my friend anywhere, anytime.
patch: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust my friend anywhere, anytime.

text: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...
asr: After all, if the little imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next.
patch: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

text: {NICKNAME} has in fact come here to stop that villain's evil scheme. Our goals are aligned.
asr: My friend has in fact come here to stop that villain's evil scheme. Our goals are aligned.
patch: My friend has in fact come here to stop that villain's evil scheme. Our goals are aligned.

text: No, {NICKNAME}...
asr: No friend.
patch: No, friend...

text: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
asr: But as to the decision the Imperator must make, she has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
patch: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... she has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.

text: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
asr: But as to the decision the Imperator must make, she has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.
patch: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... she has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.

text: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust {NICKNAME} anywhere, anytime.
asr: All right, all right. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us. She can trust my friend anywhere, anytime.
patch: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust my friend anywhere, anytime.

text: And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach {NICKNAME}'s side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.
asr: And then may it set sail in peace, drift down the river of time, along with the core flame of world bearing, reach your side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.
patch: And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach your side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.

text: And I'll share the moments I spent with {NICKNAME} with everyone. That way, the path we walked becomes a memory shared by all.
asr: And I'll share the moments I spent with you with everyone. That way, the path we walked becomes a memory shared by all.
patch: And I'll share the moments I spent with you with everyone. That way, the path we walked becomes a memory shared by all.

text: I knew it. {NICKNAME} and I can practically read each other's minds~
asr: I knew it. You and I can practically read each other's minds.
patch: I knew it. You and I can practically read each other's minds~

text: Doesn't this count as bringing in outside food, {NICKNAME}? I knew that security check was targeted at us.
asr: Doesn't this count as bringing in outside food? I knew that security check was targeted at us.
patch: Doesn't this count as bringing in outside food? I knew that security check was targeted at us.

text: This is the only way to make sure that the "Era Nova" won't happen before {NICKNAME} returns...
asr: This is the only way to make sure that the erra nova won't happen before you return.
patch: This is the only way to make sure that the "Era Nova" won't happen before you return...

text: Someone as sharp as {NICKNAME} must've realized by now that this isn't reality, but a maze of Time.
asr: Someone as sharp as you must have realized by now that this isn't reality, but a maze of time.
patch: Someone as sharp as you must've realized by now that this isn't reality, but a maze of Time.

text: Come, {NICKNAME}... This way.
asr: Come this way.
patch: Come... This way.

text: Welcome back, {NICKNAME}.
asr: Welcome back, friend.
patch: Welcome back, friend.

text: Next, {NICKNAME} will head to Styxia and find the Vortex's entrance guarded by the demigod of Ocean, before charging toward the final battlefield.
asr: Next, you will head to Styxia and find the vortex's entrance guarded by the demigod of ocean, before charging toward the final battlefield.
patch: Next, you will head to Styxia and find the Vortex's entrance guarded by the demigod of Ocean, before charging toward the final battlefield.

text: {NICKNAME}... What are you doing?
asr: What are you doing?
patch: What are you doing?

text: Do you remember when Phainon sent us back to the beginning? When {NICKNAME} and I got separated? But in the end, I returned to you, carrying all that we've been through.
asr: Do you remember when finance sent us back to the beginning, when you and I got separated? But in the end, I returned to you, carrying all that we've been through.
patch: Do you remember when Phainon sent us back to the beginning? When you and I got separated? But in the end, I returned to you, carrying all that we've been through.

text: But she'll probably get really disappointed if we tell her that... What should we do, {NICKNAME}?
asr: But she'll probably get really disappointed if we tell her that. What should we do?
patch: But she'll probably get really disappointed if we tell her that... What should we do?

text: I believe {NICKNAME} will never let us down... just like always.
asr: I believe you will never let us down, just like always.
patch: I believe you will never let us down... just like always.

text: Teehee, and that's the art of conversation! I learned it from {NICKNAME}, after all. So, how did I do?
asr: And that's the art of conversation. I learned it from you, after all. So how did I do?
patch: Teehee, and that's the art of conversation! I learned it from you, after all. So, how did I do?

text: {NICKNAME}, careful...
asr: Careful.
patch: Careful...

text: That's right, {NICKNAME}...
asr: That's right, friend.
patch: That's right, friend...

text: ...Wait! {NICKNAME}, don't go in yet...
asr: Wait! Don't go in yet.
patch: ...Wait! Don't go in yet...

text: And she's clearly hiding something. {NICKNAME}, what do you think?
asr: And she's clearly hiding something. What do you think?
patch: And she's clearly hiding something. What do you think?

text: Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.
asr: Calm and confident—that's the you I'm familiar with.
patch: Calm and confident. That's the you I'm familiar with.

text: And we may also share a common future? A future that has never emerged in any other cycles before? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}.
asr: And we may also share a common future, a future that has never emerged in any other cycles before. I believe in you, friend.
patch: And we may also share a common future? A future that has never emerged in any other cycles before? I believe in you, friend.

text: So I'm the key? Since you insist, {NICKNAME}... I'll give it my all!
asr: Oh, so I'm the key. Since you insist, friend, I'll give it my all.
patch: So I'm the key? Since you insist, friend... I'll give it my all!

text: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?
asr: It's me, friend. Don't you recognize me, or did I really change that much?
patch: It's me, friend. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?

text: In other words, since you've already saved so many worlds, {NICKNAME}, you should be used to being called a hero by now.
asr: In other words, since you've already saved so many worlds, friend, you should be used to being called a hero by now.
patch: In other words, since you've already saved so many worlds, friend, you should be used to being called a hero by now.

text: {NICKNAME}'s surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.
asr: Your surprised expression is just like what the memory is recorded.
patch: Your surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.

text: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...
asr: After all, if the little imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next.
patch: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to you, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

text: {NICKNAME}... Are you worried that the burden is too heavy for you? Don't worry. Maybe the answer isn't as complicated as you think.
asr: Are you worried that the burden is too heavy for you? Don't worry. Maybe the answer isn't as complicated as you think.
patch: Are you worried that the burden is too heavy for you? Don't worry. Maybe the answer isn't as complicated as you think.

text: {NICKNAME}... You're too curious.
asr: Friend, you're too curious.
patch: Friend... You're too curious.

text: But I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. The Trailblaze's duty has always been a heavy one.
asr: But I believe in you, friend. The trailblazer's duty has always been a heavy one.
patch: But I believe in you, friend. The Trailblaze's duty has always been a heavy one.

text: Hey. Everything about you is good, {NICKNAME}. That's why I'll remember all of it.
asr: Hey, everything about you is good, friend. That's why I'll remember all of it.
patch: Hey. Everything about you is good, friend. That's why I'll remember all of it.

text: Hmm... Which means it's probably time to borrow that treasure you're carrying, {NICKNAME}.
asr: Hmm. Which means it's probably time to borrow that treasure you're carrying, friend.
patch: Hmm... Which means it's probably time to borrow that treasure you're carrying, friend.

text: {NICKNAME}... {NICKNAME}?
asr: Friend, friend.
patch: Friend... Friend?

text: Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.
asr: Calm and confident—that's the you I'm familiar with.
patch: Calm and confident. That's the you I'm familiar with.

text: I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer, {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you both.
asr: I'm Sereni from ID Sollicitii. This is the Deliverer. Nice to meet you both.
patch: I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer. Nice to meet you both.

text: {NICKNAME}, are you ready to become a hero?
asr: Friend, are you ready to become a hero?
patch: Friend, are you ready to become a hero?

text: {NICKNAME}, why don't we find a place to hide and observe from the shadows?
asr: Why don't we find a place to hide and observe from the shadows?
patch: Why don't we find a place to hide and observe from the shadows?

text: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?
asr: It's me, friend. Don't you recognize me, or did I really change that much?
patch: It's me, friend. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?

text: It's even more accurate than a prophecy. After all, {NICKNAME} has already witnessed it, right?
asr: It's even more accurate than a prophecy. After all, she has already witnessed it, right?
patch: It's even more accurate than a prophecy. After all, she has already witnessed it, right?

text: Maybe it's because of Mem? After all, Mem's a memosprite born out of your thoughts, {NICKNAME}. Maybe our memories somehow got tangled up together?
asr: Hmm, maybe it's because of Mem. After all, Mem's a memo sprite born out of your thoughts, friend. Maybe our memories somehow got tangled up together.
patch: Maybe it's because of Mem? After all, Mem's a memosprite born out of your thoughts, friend. Maybe our memories somehow got tangled up together?

text: Look, {NICKNAME}! The venue's right ahead.
asr: Look, the venue's right ahead.
patch: Look, the venue's right ahead.

text: Why don't we take everyone with us? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. We'll never be alone, no matter what awaits us.
asr: Why don't we take everyone with us? I believe in you, friend. We'll never be alone, no matter what awaits us.
patch: Why don't we take everyone with us? I believe in you, friend. We'll never be alone, no matter what awaits us.

text: I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is {NICKNAME}. We're new here and wanted to ask you...
asr: I'm Cyrene of Aetolia. This is the Deliverer beyond the sky. We're new here and wanted to ask you.
patch: I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer beyond the sky. We're new here and wanted to ask you...

text: ...{NICKNAME}? Are you listening?
asr: Friend, are you listening?
patch: ...Friend? Are you listening?

text: I can't remember what happened in those thirty million cycles, but I remember what you, {NICKNAME}, did for this world.
asr: I can't remember what happened in those 30 million cycles, but I remember what you did for this world.
patch: I can't remember what happened in those thirty million cycles, but I remember what you did for this world.

text: {NICKNAME}, it seems like he's aiming specifically for the Chronocognitive Anchor. What should we do?
asr: It seems like he's aiming specifically for the chronocognitive anchor. What should we do?
patch: It seems like he's aiming specifically for the Chronocognitive Anchor. What should we do?

text: Thankfully, you arrived during his long wait, {NICKNAME}.
asr: Thankfully, you arrived during his long wait, friend.
patch: Thankfully, you arrived during his long wait, friend.

text: I'm prepared to witness that miracle, {NICKNAME}.
asr: I'm prepared to witness that miracle, friend.
patch: I'm prepared to witness that miracle, friend.

text: ...{NICKNAME}, we might as well dance their dance. Let's go with them to the holy city.
asr: We might as well dance their dance. Let's go with them to the holy city.
patch: ...We might as well dance their dance. Let's go with them to the holy city.

text: Exactly. Just as the prophecy foretold, {NICKNAME} is your Deliverer from beyond the sky. And she also has reliable allies.
asr: Exactly, just as the prophecy foretold, she is your deliverer from beyond the sky, and she also has reliable allies.
patch: Exactly. Just as the prophecy foretold, she is your Deliverer from beyond the sky. And she also has reliable allies.

text: ... Saying all that, I can finally fade away in peace... and become a part of {NICKNAME}.
asr: Saying all that, it can finally fade away in peace and become a part of you.
patch: ... Saying all that, I can finally fade away in peace... and become a part of you.

text: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng, and March 7th will all merge with the Scepter and become a victim of the Destruction.
asr: My friend, Donghang, and March Seventh will all merge with the Scepter and become a victim of the destruction.
patch: My friend, Dan Heng, and March 7th will all merge with the Scepter and become a victim of the Destruction.

text: Let's go there to find {NICKNAME}.
asr: Let's go there to find my friend.
patch: Let's go there to find my friend.

text: Could it be... {NICKNAME}! Maybe it's the "Stellaron" she mentioned.
asr: Could it be my friend? Maybe it's the Stellaron she mentioned.
patch: Could it be... my friend! Maybe it's the "Stellaron" she mentioned.

text: Another one of these stealth missions, huh? Help me out here, {NICKNAME}'s inner world...
asr: Hmm, another one of these stealth missions, huh? Help me out here, friends in our world.
patch: Another one of these stealth missions, huh? Help me out here, friend's inner world...

text: Thankfully, {NICKNAME}'s presence hasn't weakened. I feel like I'm getting a bit closer...
asr: Thankfully, her presence hasn't weakened. I feel like I'm getting a bit closer.
patch: Thankfully, her presence hasn't weakened. I feel like I'm getting a bit closer...

text: Though the surging memoria tide swept {NICKNAME} away... I must return to her side before Miss "Evernight" succeeds.
asr: Though the surging memoria tide swept my friend away, I must return to her side before Miss Evernight succeeds.
patch: Though the surging memoria tide swept my friend away... I must return to her side before Miss "Evernight" succeeds.

text: Is that {NICKNAME}'s photostone? What's it doing here?
asr: Is that my friend's photo stone? What's it doing here?
patch: Is that my friend's photostone? What's it doing here?

text: Welcome to the trail of "Genesis," {NICKNAME}.
asr: Welcome to the trail of Genesis, friend.
patch: Welcome to the trail of "Genesis," friend.

text: The moment when {NICKNAME} bore the weight of thirty million cycles of "memories"...
asr: The moment when our friend bore the weight of 30 million cycles of memories.
patch: The moment when our friend bore the weight of thirty million cycles of "memories"...

text: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. "Every single Cyrene"... That sounds so kind.
asr: Thank you, friend. Every single sirenix. That sounds so kind.
patch: Thank you, friend. "Every single Cyrene"... That sounds so kind.

text: My apologies, {NICKNAME}. The more memories I got back along the way, the more I felt that something wasn't right.
asr: My apologies, friend. The more memories I got back along the way, the more I felt that something wasn't right.
patch: My apologies, friend. The more memories I got back along the way, the more I felt that something wasn't right.

text: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I was also trying to cheer myself up with what I said.
asr: Thank you, friend. I was also trying to cheer myself up with what I said.
patch: Thank you, friend. I was also trying to cheer myself up with what I said.

text: I turned into a little fairy from the stories and met {NICKNAME}, yet I forgot everything.
asr: I turned into a little fairy from the stories and met you, yet I forgot everything.
patch: I turned into a little fairy from the stories and met you, yet I forgot everything.

text: Are you ready to answer the call of the world, {NICKNAME}?
asr: Are you ready to answer the call of the world, friend?
patch: Are you ready to answer the call of the world, friend?

text: Remember this moment, {NICKNAME}.
asr: Remember this moment, friend.
patch: Remember this moment, friend.

text: Look, {NICKNAME}. The words on that wall are the answer.
asr: Look, friend, the words on that wall are the answer.
patch: Look, friend. The words on that wall are the answer.

text: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Your kindness is always just right.
asr: Thank you, friend. Your kindness is always just right.
patch: Thank you, friend. Your kindness is always just right.

text: And what happens after that... I don't know either, {NICKNAME}.
asr: And what happens after that, I don't know either.
patch: And what happens after that... I don't know either.

text: That's pretty forward of you, you know? Still... thank you, {NICKNAME}. That's very reassuring.
asr: That's pretty forward of you, you know. Still, thank you, friend. That's very reassuring.
patch: That's pretty forward of you, you know? Still... thank you, friend. That's very reassuring.

text: But if I keep growing, I might be taller than you, right, {NICKNAME}? Then I'm really looking forward to that.
asr: But if I keep growing, I might be taller than you, right? Then I'm really looking forward to that.
patch: But if I keep growing, I might be taller than you, right? Then I'm really looking forward to that.

text: "{NICKNAME}, are you ready to become a hero?"
asr: Friend, are you ready to become a hero?
patch: "Friend, are you ready to become a hero?"

text: I want {NICKNAME} to call me "Cyrene."
asr: I want you to call me Sireni.
patch: I want you to call me "Cyrene."

text: This is the final puzzle piece of the "memories," {NICKNAME}.
asr: This is the final puzzle piece of the memories.
patch: This is the final puzzle piece of the "memories"

text: Don't be afraid, {NICKNAME}. Take my hand if you feel nervous.
asr: Don't be afraid. Take my hand if you feel nervous.
patch: Don't be afraid. Take my hand if you feel nervous.

text: {NICKNAME}▀▄Hold onto▄█Me▄▀▄
asr: Brandon, oh, don't you, me.
patch: ▀▄Hold onto▄█Me▄▀▄

text: {NICKNAME}'s shoulders are really dependable.
asr: Our friends' shoulders are really dependable.
patch: Friend's shoulders are really dependable.

text: "{NICKNAME}... You're already right next to me."
asr: Brent, you're already right next to me.
patch: "Friend... You're already right next to me."

text: "But I'm still here, and {NICKNAME} is still here, no?"
asr: But I'm still here, and you're still here now.
patch: "But I'm still here, and you're still here, no?"

text: Are you ready, {NICKNAME}?
asr: Are you ready, friend?
patch: Are you ready, friend?

text: "{NICKNAME}... You're... finally awake."
asr: Friend, you're finally awake.
patch: "Friend... You're... finally awake."

text: As promised, {NICKNAME}, take it now.
asr: As promised, take it now.
patch: As promised, take it now.

text: We promised each other to keep moving forward together, {NICKNAME}.
asr: We promised each other to keep moving forward together, friend.
patch: We promised each other to keep moving forward together, friend.

text: "I knew {NICKNAME}'d find this place."
asr: I knew you'd find this place.
patch: "I knew you'd find this place."

text: Make sure you watch your footing, {NICKNAME}.
asr: Make sure you watch your footing, friend.
patch: Make sure you watch your footing, friend.

text: This challenge is practically made for {NICKNAME}, isn't it?
asr: This challenge is practically made for you, isn't it?
patch: This challenge is practically made for you, isn't it?

text: "But... You're already right next to me, {NICKNAME}."
asr: But you're already right next to me, friend.
patch: "But... You're already right next to me, friend."

text: Then, take a deep breath one last time, {NICKNAME}.
asr: Then. Take a deep breath one last time, friend.
patch: Then, take a deep breath one last time, friend.

text: Scrolls filled with horrifying content... {NICKNAME}, shall we take a look?
asr: Scrolls filled with horrifying content. Friend, shall we take a look?
patch: Scrolls filled with horrifying content... Friend, shall we take a look?

text: That's why we're here, right, {NICKNAME}?
asr: That's why we're here, right, friend?
patch: That's why we're here, right, friend?

text: Come on, {NICKNAME}... The cosmos is waiting for us to flip to the next page.
asr: Come on, friend. The cosmos is waiting for us to flip to the next page.
patch: Come on, friend... The cosmos is waiting for us to flip to the next page.

text: {NICKNAME}'s eyes really lit up...
asr: My friend's eyes really lit up.
patch: My friend's eyes really lit up...

text: Relax now, {NICKNAME}. Take a deep breath.
asr: Relax now. Take a deep breath.
patch: Relax now. Take a deep breath.

text: Can you still move, {NICKNAME}? It's time... for us to complete the real "genesis."
asr: Can you still move? It's time. For us to complete the real genesis.
patch: Can you still move? It's time... for us to complete the real "genesis."

text: "{NICKNAME}, what's going on? Your consciousness... suddenly went so far away."
asr: Friend, what's going on? Your consciousness suddenly went so far away.
patch: "Friend, what's going on? Your consciousness... suddenly went so far away."

text: Thirty million similar yet different stories... Doesn't it sound like a lot? But I never grew tired of it. I even relived it when I travelled with {NICKNAME}, and it was still so moving! However, there were always regrets left on every single page. I wanted to add some smiles here and fill up some blanks there... It was all thanks to {NICKNAME} that we could finally compose a romantic ending for them ♪
asr: Thirty million similar yet different stories—doesn't it sound like a lot? But I never grew tired of it. I even relived it when I traveled with you, and it was still so moving. However, there were always regrets left on every single page. I wanted to add some smiles here and fill up some blanks there. It was all thanks to you that we could finally compose a romantic ending for them.
patch: Thirty million similar yet different stories... Doesn't it sound like a lot? But I never grew tired of it. I even relived it when I travelled with you, and it was still so moving! However, there were always regrets left on every single page. I wanted to add some smiles here and fill up some blanks there... It was all thanks to you that we could finally compose a romantic ending for them ♪

text: I really look forward to seeing how {NICKNAME}'s "story" will unfold in future journeys. I hope Amphoreus's "memories" will become a romantic note in those journeys... It definitely will, right? ♪
asr: I really look forward to seeing how your story will unfold in future journeys. I hope Amphoreus's memories will become a romantic note in those journeys. It definitely will, right?
patch: I really look forward to seeing how your "story" will unfold in future journeys. I hope Amphoreus's "memories" will become a romantic note in those journeys... It definitely will, right? ♪

text: The Imperator's crown really grabs your attention. Maybe... the next time we're in Aedes Elysiae, {NICKNAME} can also make a wreath of wheat for me ♪
asr: The Emperor's crown really grabs your attention. Maybe the next time we're in Idy Silicī, you can also make a wreath of wheat for me.
patch: The Imperator's crown really grabs your attention. Maybe... the next time we're in Aedes Elysiae, you can also make a wreath of wheat for me ♪

text: Do you like swings, {NICKNAME}? Whenever I swing with the wind, my heart soars super high as well. It feels like I could catch up to everything I've longed for. Come on, let's go on the swings together. You can hold my hand if you're scared~
asr: Do you like swings? Whenever I swing with the wind, my heart soars super high as well. It feels like I could catch up to everything I've longed for. Come on, let's go on the swings together. You can hold my hand if you're scared.
patch: Do you like swings? Whenever I swing with the wind, my heart soars super high as well. It feels like I could catch up to everything I've longed for. Come on, let's go on the swings together. You can hold my hand if you're scared~

text: {NICKNAME} always talks about Dan Heng. After all, having such a reliable companion to support the road ahead must be why the Trailblaze can dash forward so courageously.
asr: You always talk about Dan Heng. After all, having such a reliable companion to support the road ahead must be why the Trailblaze can-forward so courageously.
patch: You always talk about Dan Heng. After all, having such a reliable companion to support the road ahead must be why the Trailblaze can dash forward so courageously.
